name: State Change Step
description: Wrap an explicit RobotCellState into a named state-change PlanStep. Drop between trajectory steps in a Cf_MotionPlan to record gripper toggles, tool attach/detach, rigid body grasp/release.

inputParameters.name: name
inputParameters.description: Unique name for this state change within the plan (e.g. 'grasp', 'release').

inputParameters.name: post_state
inputParameters.description: RobotCellState describing the cell AFTER the change (e.g. with a tool attached, or a rigid body grasped).
